Notice Of Motion And Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And For Entry Of [Proposed] Consent Judgment As To Defendant Walmart Inc.
Off Calendar Jul-10-2023 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

RE: Plaintiff ECOLOGICAL RIGHTS FOUNDATION's Motion to Approve Proposition 65 Settlement and For Entry Of [Proposed] Consent Judgment as To Defendant Walmart Inc.

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

The court adopts its tentative ruling. Plaintiff ECOLOGICAL RIGHTS FOUNDATION's unopposed "motion to approve Proposition 65 settlement and for entry of [proposed] consent judgment" is granted.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr. Clerk: Robert Woods. Not reported. (302/RBU)

No appearances made in this matter. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Matter is off calendar per withdrawal filed by the moving party.
